import { Atom, AtomOptions, Observer, ReadonlyAtom } from './types.js'; export declare function toObserver<T>(nextHandler?: Observer<T> | ((value: T) => void), errorHandler?: (error: any) => void, completionHandler?: () => void): Observer<T>; export declare function flush(): void; type AsyncAtomState<TData, TError = unknown> = { status: 'pending'; } | { status: 'done'; data: TData; } | { status: 'error'; error: TError; }; export declare function createAsyncAtom<T>(getValue: () => Promise<T>, options?: AtomOptions<AsyncAtomState<T>>): ReadonlyAtom<AsyncAtomState<T>>; export declare function createAtom<T>(getValue: (prev?: NoInfer<T>) => T, options?: AtomOptions<T>): ReadonlyAtom<T>; export declare function createAtom<T>(initialValue: T, options?: AtomOptions<T>): Atom<T>; export {};
